name: Lint & Typecheck on Save
description: Runs ESLint and TypeScript typecheck when a source file is saved. Catches type errors and lint violations before they accumulate.

then.prompt: A source file was just saved. Run `npm run lint` and `npm run typecheck` mentally by checking the saved file for: (1) TypeScript type errors, (2) ESLint violations, (3) imports not in the correct order (React/Next → third-party → local @/*), (4) file length exceeding 300 lines. Report any issues found with file path and line number. Do not auto-fix — list the problems only.
